title: cystopteris pellucida
intro: Cystopteris pellucida, also known as the brittle fern or crystal fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Cystopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cystopteris pellucida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic. Cystopteris pellucida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
